untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) 'spread' as a direct indicator — only bb_bandwidth (Bollinger Band spread proxy) available; (2) 'limit order execution probability estimate' — no order-flow or microstructure probability indicator in allowed set; (3) 'news/event detection' — no economic calendar or news sentiment indicator available. Used bb_bandwidth as narrow-spread proxy and price_pos_20 as execution-probability proxy, but these are approximations only.
translation_notes: Mapped 'abnormally narrow spreads' to bb_bandwidth < 30th percentile threshold. Mapped 'limit order execution probability < 40%' to price_pos_20 < 0.4 as a position-in-range proxy. Unable to encode news buffer condition directly. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal spec, suggesting entry is either LONG or SHORT depending on bid-ask imbalance direction (not specified in entry conditions). Hold period set to 1 day (immediate fill assumption). Exit when spread normalizes (bb_bandwidth > 50th percentile).
